languages.original_text: "I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"

languages.text: "Я обратил внимание на вашу коллекцию книг, леди-навигатор. Внимательность, тонкий литературный вкус, пытливость ума... Ведомо ли вам о том, что в вас есть задатки эрудита с нетривиальным подходом к познанию?"

"I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"
languages.original_text: "Я обратил внимание на вашу коллекцию книг, леди-навигатор. Внимательность, тонкий литературный вкус, пытливость ума... Ведомо ли вам о том, что в вас есть задатки эрудита с нетривиальным подходом к познанию?"

"I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"

"I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"

languages.text: «Me he percatado de su colección de libros, lady Navegante. Criterio, un gusto sofisticado y una mente curiosa... ¿Es consciente de que cumple todos los requisitos para convertirse en una erudita de éxito?».
languages.original_text: "I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"

traits.locale_text: «Me he percatado de su colección de libros, lady Navegante. Criterio, un gusto sofisticado y una mente curiosa... ¿Es consciente de que cumple todos los requisitos para convertirse en una erudita de éxito?».

languages.text: 「あなたの蔵書を拝見しました、ナビゲーター殿。識別眼、洗練された文学的趣味、探究心に富む知性……ご自身に博識家、そして本格的な学者の素質が備わっていることに、お気づきでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの蔵書を拝見しました、ナビゲーター殿。識別眼、洗練された文学的趣味、探究心に富む知性……ご自身に博識家、そして本格的な学者の素質が備わっていることに、お気づきでしょうか？」

languages.text: “我注意到了你的藏书，导航者女士。你拥有优秀的鉴赏力、高雅的文学品味，以及好奇的头脑……你是否意识到，你具有成为一名博学者和严肃学者的潜质？”
languages.original_text: "I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"

traits.locale_text: “我注意到了你的藏书，导航者女士。你拥有优秀的鉴赏力、高雅的文学品味，以及好奇的头脑……你是否意识到，你具有成为一名博学者和严肃学者的潜质？”

languages.text: "Mir ist Eure Büchersammlung aufgefallen, Lady Navigator. Scharfsinn, ein erlesener literarischer Geschmack, Wissbegier ... Wisst Ihr, dass Ihr das Zeug zu einer ernsthaften Gelehrten habt?"
languages.original_text: "I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"

traits.locale_text: "Mir ist Eure Büchersammlung aufgefallen, Lady Navigator. Scharfsinn, ein erlesener literarischer Geschmack, Wissbegier ... Wisst Ihr, dass Ihr das Zeug zu einer ernsthaften Gelehrten habt?"

languages.text: « J'ai remarqué votre collection de livres, dame navigatrice. Du discernement, un goût sophistiqué en matière de littérature, un esprit curieux... Saviez-vous que vous aviez l'étoffe d'une grande érudite ? »
languages.original_text: "I have noticed your collection of books, Lady Navigator. Discernment, a sophisticated literary taste, an inquisitive mind... Are you aware that you have the makings of an erudite and a serious scholar?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai remarqué votre collection de livres, dame navigatrice. Du discernement, un goût sophistiqué en matière de littérature, un esprit curieux... Saviez-vous que vous aviez l'étoffe d'une grande érudite ? »

languages.text: "Kitap koleksiyonunuzu fark ettim Leydi Rotacı. Seçicilik, gelişmiş bir edebi zevk, sorgulayıcı bir zihin... Bilgili ve ciddi bir bilim insanı olma potansiyeline sahip olduğunuzun farkında mısınız?"
